_shorthelp: Calculator displays a result based on formula. Remember to use Number() around values from TextBoxes.

_color.desc: Color of letters. Can be name, #RRGGBB or rgb(R,G,B).

_backgroundColor.desc: Color of background. Can be name, #RRGGBB, rgb(R,G,B) or transparent.

_formula.desc: Formula. Must be a valid JavaScript expression.

_htmltemplate: "<output id='{id}' class='{class}' data-nsb-type=Label style='text-align:{align}; text-shadow:none; {if fontSize<>''}font-size:{fontSize!p}; {/if}{if fontFamily<>''}font-family:{fontFamily}; {/if}{if fontStyle<>''}font-style:{fontStyle}; {/if}{if fontWeight<>''}font-weight:{fontWeight}; {/if}{if color<>''}color:{color}; {/if}{if backgroundColor<>''}background-color:{backgroundColor}; {/if}{if borderWidth.isdigit()}border-width:{borderWidth!p}; border-style:{borderStyle}; border-color:{borderColor}; {/if} {hidden}{style!j}'> </output>",
